caption: A woman with dark hair pulled back, wearing a dark green long-sleeved shirt, speaks into a professional microphone in a studio setting. Behind her is a dark wall with yellow trim. In the first frame, she gestures with her hands while talking, and a man in a black t-shirt is visible in the background. By the second frame, she places her hand over her chest as she continues to speak. The scene then shifts to a man with a beard and sunglasses, wearing a red hoodie and headphones, who smiles while speaking into a microphone. Beside him, a woman in a white top is partially visible. White stylized text reading "BOSS TALK 101" appears across the lower half of the screen in the final two frames. A mixing board and various microphone stands are visible throughout the studio environment.
